title: A: Empty Project
description:
A: Empty Project

A: Empty Project

Step 2.

When the following window is displayed, select [Empty project], and then click [Next].

Step 3.

Select a Controller to connect. If it doesn't have connecting Controller in the list, click [New Connection] then Controller connecting wizard will start. For more details, refer to 5.10.1.2  Controller Connection.

Step 4.

This is the end of the steps for the project wizard.
